changes: Moved the CLI binary from src/bin/decomp-orchestrator.ts to apps/cli/src/bin/decomp-orchestrator.ts.
Moved CLI command modules from src/cli to apps/cli/src/cli.
Moved the dashboard server from src/ui/server.ts to apps/dashboard-server/src/server.ts.
Moved trusted report helpers from src/ui/trusted-report.ts to apps/dashboard-server/src/trusted-report.ts.
Updated root orch, regression-check, kg:*, ui:server, ui:dev, and ui:dev:hot-server scripts to use app entrypoints.
Updated CLI child-process paths in babysit and trigger-agent to spawn apps/cli/src/bin/decomp-orchestrator.ts from the repository root.
Updated dashboard server process commands to spawn the CLI app entrypoint and serve apps/dashboard/dist.
Exported fetchDashboardServer and serveDashboardServer so dashboard API/static behavior can be validated without starting a UI server.
Expanded root tsconfig.json coverage to include apps/cli, apps/dashboard-server, packages, and tests while keeping apps/dashboard on ui:check.
Fixed core loadLocalEnv() repository-root resolution after the core package move.
Updated active README and implementation docs for the apps/packages workspace layout.

commands.summary: Workspace lockfile refreshed after dashboard-server gained its agents workspace dependency.
Root TypeScript check passed with apps/cli, apps/dashboard-server, packages, tests, and dashboard ui:check covered.
Root smoke passed through the moved CLI app entrypoint.
Dashboard production build passed and wrote apps/dashboard/dist.
Root CLI compatibility command printed usage through apps/cli/src/bin/decomp-orchestrator.ts.
Fixture status smoke returned {"runs":0} from the moved CLI.
Non-listening dashboard validation returned packageRoot for /api/config and served built dashboard HTML with assets.
Root kg script listed 11 sources and 4 tools from the moved CLI app.
Docs audit still reports pre-existing archive/frontmatter/naming and missing chart-asset issues; active monorepo path references were updated and active knowledge child docs are linked.
